allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\('=== transactionRequest ==='\) print\('chainId:', data.get\('transactionRequest', {}\).get\('chainId'\)\) print\('to:', data.get\('transactionRequest', {}\).get\('to'\)\) print\('value:', data.get\('transactionRequest', {}\).get\('value'\)\) print\(\) print\('=== action ==='\) print\('fromChainId:', data.get\('action', {}\).get\('fromChainId'\)\) print\('toChainId:', data.get\('action', {}\).get\('toChainId'\)\) print\('fromToken chainId:', data.get\('action', {}\).get\('fromToken', {}\).get\('chainId'\)\) print\('toToken chainId:', data.get\('action', {}\).get\('toToken', {}\).get\('chainId'\)\) print\(\) print\('=== gasCosts ==='\) for gc in data.get\('estimate', {}\).get\('gasCosts', []\): print\('price:', gc.get\('price'\), '\(wei\)'\) print\('estimate:', gc.get\('estimate'\)\) print\('limit:', gc.get\('limit'\)\) print\('amount:', gc.get\('amount'\)\) print\('amountUSD:', gc.get\('amountUSD'\)\) print\('token chainId:', gc.get\('token', {}\).get\('chainId'\)\) print\('token symbol:', gc.get\('token', {}\).get\('symbol'\)\) print\(\) print\('=== includedSteps ==='\) for step in data.get\('includedSteps', []\): print\('step type:', step.get\('type'\)\) print\('step action fromChainId:', step.get\('action', {}\).get\('fromChainId'\)\) print\('step action toChainId:', step.get\('action', {}\).get\('toChainId'\)\) if 'estimate' in step and 'gasCosts' in step['estimate']: for gc in step['estimate']['gasCosts']: print\(' gas price:', gc.get\('price'\), '\(wei\) =', gc.get\('price'\)/1e9, 'gwei'\) print\(' gas limit:', gc.get\('limit'\)\) print\(' gas amountUSD:', gc.get\('amountUSD'\)\) print\(' gas token chainId:', gc.get\('token', {}\).get\('chainId'\)\) ")
